languages.text: "Слова истинного {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}героя Империума{/d}! Пока вы с нами, Ваша Светлость, ни малейший росток страха или сомнения не проклюнется в наших душах! Я напомню об этом солдатам".

"The words of a true {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d}! As long as you are with us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not even the slightest seed of fear or doubt will take root in our souls! I will remind the soldiers of this."
languages.original_text: "Слова истинного {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}героя Империума{/d}! Пока вы с нами, Ваша Светлость, ни малейший росток страха или сомнения не проклюнется в наших душах! Я напомню об этом солдатам".

traits.locale_text: "The words of a true {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d}! As long as you are with us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not even the slightest seed of fear or doubt shall take root in our souls! I will remind the soldiers of this."

"The words of a true {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d}! As long as you are with us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not even the slightest seed of fear or doubt shall take root in our souls! I will remind the soldiers of this."

"The words of a true {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d}! As long as you are with us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not even the slightest seed of fear or doubt shall take root in our souls! I will remind the soldiers of this."

"The words of a true {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d}! As long as you are with us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not even the slightest seed of fear or doubt shall take root in our souls! I will remind the soldiers of this."

languages.text: “这才是真正的{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}帝国英雄{/d}会说的话！只要您与我们同在，大人，哪怕最微小的恐惧或怀疑，也休想在我们的灵魂中生根！我会让士兵们牢牢记住这一点。”
languages.original_text: "The words of a true {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d}! As long as you are with us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not even the slightest seed of fear or doubt shall take root in our souls! I will remind the soldiers of this."

traits.locale_text: “这才是真正的{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}帝国英雄{/d}会说的话！只要您与我们同在，大人，哪怕最微小的恐惧或怀疑，也休想在我们的灵魂中生根！我会让士兵们牢牢记住这一点。”

languages.text: "Gerçek bir {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}İmparatorluk kahramanının{/d} sözleri! Siz bizimle olduğunuz sürece {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, ruhumuzda en ufak bir korku veya şüphe tohumu bile kök salamayacak! Bunu askerlere hatırlatacağım."
languages.original_text: "The words of a true {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d}! As long as you are with us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not even the slightest seed of fear or doubt shall take root in our souls! I will remind the soldiers of this."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçek bir {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}İmparatorluk kahramanının{/d} sözleri! Siz bizimle olduğunuz sürece {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, ruhumuzda en ufak bir korku veya şüphe tohumu bile kök salamayacak! Bunu askerlere hatırlatacağım."

languages.text: « Des paroles dignes {mf|d'un|d'une} véritable {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}{mf|héros|héroïne} de l'Imperium{/d} ! Tant que vous vous tiendrez à nos côtés, Votre Seigneurie, nous ne céderons ni à la peur ni aux doutes ! Je le répéterai aux soldats. »
languages.original_text: "The words of a true {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d}! As long as you are with us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not even the slightest seed of fear or doubt shall take root in our souls! I will remind the soldiers of this."

traits.locale_text: « Des paroles dignes {mf|d'un|d'une} véritable {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}{mf|héros|héroïne} de l'Imperium{/d} ! Tant que vous vous tiendrez à nos côtés, Votre Seigneurie, nous ne céderons ni à la peur ni aux doutes ! Je le répéterai aux soldats. »

languages.text: «¡Las palabras de un{mf||a} verdader{mf|o|a} {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}héroe del Imperium{/d}! ¡Mientras esté a nuestro lado, mi{mf|lord|lady}, ni la más mínima semilla de miedo ni duda arraigará en nuestras almas! Se lo recordaré a los soldados».
languages.original_text: "The words of a true {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d}! As long as you are with us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not even the slightest seed of fear or doubt shall take root in our souls! I will remind the soldiers of this."

traits.locale_text: «¡Las palabras de un{mf||a} verdader{mf|o|a} {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}héroe del Imperium{/d}! ¡Mientras esté a nuestro lado, mi{mf|lord|lady}, ni la más mínima semilla de miedo ni duda arraigará en nuestras almas! Se lo recordaré a los soldados».

languages.text: "Die Worte eines echten {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}Helden des Imperiums{/d}! Solange Ihr bei uns seid, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, wird weder Furcht noch Zweifel in unseren Seelen keimen. Ich werde die Soldaten daran erinnern."
languages.original_text: "The words of a true {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d}! As long as you are with us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not even the slightest seed of fear or doubt shall take root in our souls! I will remind the soldiers of this."

traits.locale_text: "Die Worte eines echten {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}Helden des Imperiums{/d}! Solange Ihr bei uns seid, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, wird weder Furcht noch Zweifel in unseren Seelen keimen. Ich werde die Soldaten daran erinnern."

languages.text: 「帝国の真の{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}英雄の言葉だ{/d}！貴方{mf|殿|女殿}が我々と共にいる限り、我らの魂に恐怖や疑いの芽は生えない！この言葉を兵士たちに伝えよう。」
languages.original_text: "The words of a true {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d}! As long as you are with us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, not even the slightest seed of fear or doubt shall take root in our souls! I will remind the soldiers of this."

traits.locale_text: 「帝国の真の{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}英雄の言葉だ{/d}！貴方{mf|殿|女殿}が我々と共にいる限り、我らの魂に恐怖や疑いの芽は生えない！この言葉を兵士たちに伝えよう。」
